discover.title: We bring transparency into the opaque landscape of online antiques
discover.p1: We search through the vast offerings of thousands of scattered antique dealers, auction houses and marketplaces worldwide every day and bundle their items in one central place.
discover.p2: We not only capture current and upcoming items but also track price changes and availability. This way, you never miss a bargain and always keep an eye on the market.

highlight1.title: Over 500 Dealers, Auction Houses & Marketplaces
highlight1.description: We continuously search renowned antique dealers, auction houses and marketplaces from all over Europe and beyond.

highlight2.title: Near Real-Time Monitoring
highlight2.description: Newly offered antiques as well as price- or availability-changes are automatically captured in near real-time.

highlight3.title: Fully Language-agnostic
highlight3.description: We translate every antique into multiple languages. The language in which you search does not matter. We currently support English, German, French, Spanish and Italian.

landingPage.titleFirstLine: Discover rare antiques<1/>across the global market
landingPage.subtitle: Aura Historia searches antique dealers, auction houses, and marketplaces worldwide — helping you uncover pieces others never see.

features.title: Antiques are scattered everywhere online - your search shouldn't be
features.subtitle: We are the most sophisticated search engine for antiques and provide you with all the tools to efficiently search the antiques market.

search.title: Intelligent Search
search.description: Search hundreds of thousands of items with our powerful search engine. Cut out all the noise by filtering for condition, price, dealer, and much more.

global.title: Worldwide Coverage
global.description: We connect you with renowned antique dealers from over 15 countries – from Germany to the USA. No matter how small the dealer, if he has an online-shop, we are adding it.

history.title: Change History
history.description: Track all changes to an item – from price adjustments to status changes. We opt for the maximum amount of transparency.

watchlist.title: Personal Watchlist
watchlist.description: Save interesting items and keep track of their development. Get notified when price or availability changes.

translations.title: Automatic Translations
translations.description: Search and discover all items in your preferred language, without any barriers. We currently support English, German, French, Spanish and Italian.

personalFilter.title: Search Requests
personalFilter.description: Save your search request and get notified about new offers or updated items. The antiques you used to search for, now come to you.

aiSearchAgent.title: Personal AI Search Agent
aiSearchAgent.description: Your personal AI agent helps you find the most specific antiques. In combination with search requests, describe what you're looking for in plain language - as detailed as you wish. We will notify you as soon as hits match what you described.

communityWishes.title: Your wishes
communityWishes.description: You have critique, are missing something or have an idea what we should improve or add? We'll listen very closely. Contact us at contact@aura-historia.com and we will make it happen.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Just a few steps to your dream pieces.

step1.title: Search
step1.description: Enter what you're looking for – whether furniture, jewelry, art, or collectibles.

step2.title: Discover
step2.description: Browse results from thousands of dealers at a glance.

step3.title: Save
step3.description: Save interesting items to your watchlist or save your search criteria as an alert.

step4.title: Get notified
step4.description: Get notified by email as soon as an item on your watchlist changes or a new one matches your criteria.

testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.subtitle: Learn how we help collectors live their passion.

testimonial1.name: Margarete W.
testimonial1.quote: Finally a platform that makes searching for rare pieces easier. The price notifications have helped me find real bargains multiple times.

testimonial2.name: Heinrich K.
testimonial2.quote: As a dealer, I use Aura Historia to keep an eye on the market. The price developments help me enormously with my own pricing.

testimonial3.name: Elisabeth M.
testimonial3.quote: I'm amazed by the clarity. Before, I spent hours searching through different dealer sites. Now I find everything in one place.

newsletter.title: Stay informed
newsletter.description: Receive weekly curated finds, market trends, and exclusive insights directly in your inbox.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Here you'll find answers to the most important questions about Aura Historia.

howItWorks.question: How does Aura Historia work?
howItWorks.answer: Aura Historia continuously searches the websites of over 500 antique dealers, auction houses and marketplaces worldwide and collects all offers in one central place. Our intelligent search allows you to find exactly what you're looking for.

directPurchase.question: Can I buy items directly through Aura Historia?
directPurchase.answer: No, Aura Historia is a pure search platform. If you want to buy an item, you will be redirected directly to the respective dealer's website where you can complete the purchase.

priceAlerts.question: How do price and availability notifications work?
priceAlerts.answer: Once you add an item to your watchlist, we automatically track its price- and availability development for you. As soon as something changes with your item, you receive a notification via E-Mail.

updateFrequency.question: How often is the data updated?
updateFrequency.answer: Our data is continuously updated. We operate in near real-time.

dealers.question: Which Antique Online-Shops are on Aura Historia?
dealers.answer: We include data from over 500 renowned antique dealers from more than 15 countries. Among them you'll find both, large auction houses and specialized dealers for all antique areas.

dealerRequest.question: I know an online dealer/auction house/marketplace that's not yet on Aura Historia. Can we add it?
dealerRequest.answer: Yes! Send us an email to contact@aura-historia.com and include the URL/Link of the shop along any additional information you might want to provide. We will verify the shop and include it within hours.

comparisonBarnebys.question: How does Aura Historia compare to Barnebys?
comparisonBarnebys.answer: While Barnebys is also an antiques search engine, they only focus on the largest players - the big auction houses and dealers. This makes up for a very high chance for you to miss out on what you're actually searching for. Ask yourself, where did I find my biggest treasures? It probably was a small local dealer or even thrift store.

comparisonPriceDatabase.question: How does Aura Historia compare to price databases like WorthPoint and the salesroom?
comparisonPriceDatabase.answer: Price databases leverage the sheer amount of historical data with auction results dating back to the 90s. While this helps finding comparisons for astronomically rare pieces, it often deflects the current market-value and availability of antiques. If your goal is to find antiques or research their current value, Aura Historia is the right place. We also want to take a heavy standpoint against the monetization of historical antique pricing data. You should not need to pay to find out what sold at which price.

hero.title:
Sell antiques or art online?
Reach collectors worldwide.
hero.subtitle: Join Aura Historia – the search engine collectors use to find exactly what you sell. Free, no commitment, set up in minutes.

motivation.title: Why join the program?
motivation.subtitle: Aura Historia connects motivated collectors directly with your pieces – with zero sales commission.

audience.title: A global collector community
audience.description: Reach buyers in 15+ countries who actively search for rare antiques and art.

traffic.title: More qualified traffic
traffic.description: We send interested visitors straight to your shop – every click counts for you, not for us.

highIntent.title: High-intent leads
highIntent.description: Our intelligent platform matches collectors with what they truly want. The result: enquiries with real buying intent.

trust.title: Partner-Shop badge
trust.description: Stand out with the verified Partner-Shop badge and earn the trust of demanding collectors.

realtime.title: Real-time sync
realtime.description: New pieces appear in our search instantly – your buyers are the first to know.

noCommission.title: No sales commission
noCommission.description: We don't earn from your sales. You keep 100% of your revenue.

stats.title: What our partners experience
stats.subtitle: Current averages across our partner network.

newBuyers.label: New buyers you wouldn't have reached otherwise

setup.label: Until your first product is live

stats.disclaimer: Numbers reflect averages across active partner shops. Individual results may vary.

integrations.title: Connect your shop in minutes
integrations.subtitle: Pick the integration that fits your setup. Every option syncs in minutes – no code required.

woocommerce.title: WordPress · WooCommerce
woocommerce.description: Install our extension straight from the WordPress plugin directory. One click – done.

shopify.title: Shopify app
shopify.description: Connect your Shopify store with one click from the Shopify App Store.

customApi.title: Custom integration · API key
customApi.description: Full control over REST endpoints with a scoped API key – ideal for custom shop systems.

howEasy.title: Online in three steps
howEasy.subtitle: No code, no prior knowledge, no risk. Here's how you become a partner.

apply.title: Apply
apply.description: Fill in a short form. We review your shop and get back to you within a few days.

claim.title: Set up your shop
claim.description: Claim your shop and complete your profile in our dashboard.

connect.title: Activate the integration
connect.description: Choose WooCommerce, Shopify or our API – your products appear live automatically.

faq.title: Partner program · frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions partners ask us most.

free.question: What does the partner program cost?
free.answer: The partner program is entirely free. There are no setup, listing or sales fees – we don't earn from your sales.

cancel.question: Can I leave at any time?
cancel.answer: Yes. You can end your partnership at any time, without notice and without giving a reason. We remove your products on request right away.

technical.question: Do I need technical skills?
technical.answer: No. For WooCommerce and Shopify, a single click installs everything. Our extension handles the rest. Only the custom API integration benefits from development experience.

exclusivity.question: Do I have to sell exclusively through Aura Historia?
exclusivity.answer: No. You keep selling on your own website and every other platform you already use. We bring you additional traffic – we don't replace anything.

data.question: What happens to my product data?
data.answer: We only sync publicly visible product information to make it discoverable in our search. Purchases happen on your website. You retain full control over your data.

transactions.question: Are sales processed through Aura Historia?
transactions.answer: No. Buyers are sent straight to your shop to complete the purchase. You keep your customer relationship, your payment processing and 100% of your revenue.

fit.question: Which shops fit the program?
fit.answer: We look for reputable online shops selling antiques, art, collectibles and comparable historical objects. Auction houses and specialised dealers are explicitly welcome.

support.question: Will I get help during setup?
support.answer: Yes. Our partner team supports you personally during onboarding and is reachable by email – also long after launch.

finalCta.title: Ready to reach collectors worldwide?
finalCta.subtitle: Apply for free in under two minutes. No contract, no risk, full control.

saveDialog.title: Save Search Filter
saveDialog.aiDescriptionPlaceholder: Virgin Mary oil painting on canvas, not wood, Baroque frame with gold leaf on chalk ground (gesso). The motif should be Mater Dolorosa. The artist's signature must be included. The painting must not contain any visible damage and the frame must be completely intact. If the painting is from the Spanish Baroque, it must be at least 40x60 cm in size. This does not apply to the Italian Baroque.
